columns.name: EventType
columns.description: Event type identifier, typically 'akamai_siem'.

columns.name: ApiVersion
columns.description: API schema version for this event.

columns.name: Format
columns.description: Response format descriptor returned by the API (e.g., 'json').

columns.name: ConfigId
columns.description: Unique identifier of the Akamai security configuration that generated the event.

columns.name: PolicyId
columns.description: Security policy identifier within the configuration.

columns.name: ClientIp
columns.description: IP address of the client that triggered the security event.

columns.name: AppliedAction
columns.description: Action taken in response to the attack (e.g., alert, deny, abort).

columns.name: ClientReputation
columns.description: Client reputation score or category as assessed by Akamai.

columns.name: ApiId
columns.description: API definition identifier if the event is associated with an API endpoint.

columns.name: SlowPostAction
columns.description: Slow POST protection action applied (e.g., alert, abort).

columns.name: SlowPostRate
columns.description: Observed rate for a slow POST attack attempt.

columns.name: RuleActions
columns.description: Semicolon-delimited, URL-encoded, base64-encoded list of rule actions that triggered.

columns.name: RuleData
columns.description: Semicolon-delimited, URL-encoded, base64-encoded rule data payload for matched rules.

columns.name: RuleMessages
columns.description: Semicolon-delimited, URL-encoded, base64-encoded human-readable messages for matched rules.

columns.name: RuleSelectors
columns.description: Semicolon-delimited, URL-encoded, base64-encoded selectors (request parts) that matched the rules.

columns.name: RuleTags
columns.description: Semicolon-delimited, URL-encoded, base64-encoded tags classifying the matched rules.

columns.name: RuleVersions
columns.description: Semicolon-delimited, base64-encoded list of rule versions corresponding to each matched rule.

columns.name: Rules
columns.description: Semicolon-delimited, base64-encoded list of matched rule IDs (e.g., '950002;950006').

columns.name: GeoAsn
columns.description: Autonomous System Number (ASN) of the client's network.

columns.name: GeoCity
columns.description: City derived from the client's IP address.

columns.name: GeoContinent
columns.description: Numeric continent identifier derived from the client's IP address, as returned by the Akamai geo lookup.

columns.name: GeoCountry
columns.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code derived from the client's IP address.

columns.name: GeoRegionCode
columns.description: Region or state code derived from the client's IP address.

columns.name: HttpRequestId
columns.description: Unique request identifier assigned by Akamai.

columns.name: HttpRequestTime
columns.description: Unix epoch timestamp (seconds) when the HTTP request was received.

columns.name: HttpHost
columns.description: HTTP Host header value from the inbound request.

columns.name: HttpMethod
columns.description: HTTP method of the request (e.g., GET, POST, PUT).

columns.name: HttpPath
columns.description: Request URL path.

columns.name: HttpPort
columns.description: TCP port number used for the connection.

columns.name: HttpProtocol
columns.description: HTTP protocol version (e.g., HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2).

columns.name: HttpQueryString
columns.description: URL query string of the request.

columns.name: HttpResponseCode
columns.description: HTTP status code returned by the origin or WAF (e.g., 200, 403). Source field: httpMessage.status.

columns.name: HttpResponseBytes
columns.description: Number of bytes in the HTTP response body, returned as a string by the API.

columns.name: HttpRequestHeaders
columns.description: URL-encoded request headers captured by the WAF.

columns.name: HttpResponseHeaders
columns.description: URL-encoded response headers captured by the WAF.

columns.name: BotScore
columns.description: Bot risk score assigned by Akamai Bot Manager (0-100; higher = more bot-like).

columns.name: BotResponseSegment
columns.description: Bot Manager response segment identifier used to categorise the bot action taken.

columns.name: ClientAppBundleId
columns.description: Mobile application bundle identifier, present for requests from Akamai SDK-instrumented mobile apps.

columns.name: ClientAppVersion
columns.description: Version of the mobile application, present for SDK-instrumented requests.

columns.name: ClientSdkVersion
columns.description: Version of the Akamai mobile SDK embedded in the client application.

columns.name: ClientTelemetryType
columns.description: Telemetry source type code indicating how the client data was collected.

columns.name: IdentityJa4
columns.description: JA4 TLS client fingerprint - a compact string representing the TLS handshake characteristics of the client.

columns.name: IdentityTlsFingerprintV2
columns.description: Akamai TLS fingerprint v2 (hex string) derived from the client TLS handshake.

columns.name: IdentityTlsFingerprintV3
columns.description: Akamai TLS fingerprint v3 string; includes version prefix and fingerprint value.

columns.name: UserRiskAllow
columns.description: Indicates whether the user was allowed (1) or blocked (0) based on user risk evaluation.

columns.name: UserRiskEmailDomain
columns.description: Email domain of the user associated with this request.

columns.name: UserRiskGeneral
columns.description: General risk signals as pipe-delimited key:value pairs (e.g., 'duc_1h:10|duc_1d:30').

columns.name: UserRiskOriginUserId
columns.description: Unique user identifier from the origin system (e.g., internal user ID).

columns.name: UserRiskRisk
columns.description: Risk signal breakdown as pipe-delimited key:value pairs (e.g., 'udfp:1325gdg4/M|unp:74256/H').

columns.name: UserRiskScore
columns.description: Composite user risk score (0-100; higher = riskier).

columns.name: UserRiskStatus
columns.description: User risk evaluation status code.

columns.name: UserRiskTrust
columns.description: Trust signal breakdown as pipe-delimited key:value pairs (e.g., 'ugp:US').

columns.name: UserRiskUsername
columns.description: Authenticated username associated with the request.

columns.name: UserRiskUuid
columns.description: UUID of the user risk session, used to correlate risk signals across requests.
